channel.title: Build5nines.com on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Build5nines.com on .NET Ramblings

item.title: Terraform: Easier Azure Region Pairing and Governance with the Build5Nines Region Map Module
item.description: Managing Azure regions in Terraform sounds simple at first. You define a location variable, pass in something like eastus, and move on. That works fine for a small deployment. But once you start building real enterprise-scale Azure environments, region management gets messy fast. You need consistent region abbreviations for naming standards. You need to know the paired Azure […] The article Terraform: Easier Azure Region Pairing and Governance with the Build5Nines Region Map Module was originally published on Build5Nines.
